input.instruction: 请你阅读以上多个公司的财务报表，仅根据上述看到的内容回答以下问题。对于问题中涉及到的财报中没有的内容，你可以忽略这部分，只回答其他部分。
input.question: 请回答 '交易性金融资产' 最高的公司是哪一个？
input.task_goal: Identify which company has the highest value of '交易性金融资产' (trading financial assets) based on the provided financial reports.
input.task_model: - [MODEL_1] answer_topology=scalar | atomic_decision=comparison | search_regime=closed_set | grounding_unit=table_row | coverage_mode=exhaustive | stop_condition=when the highest trading financial assets value is identified across all documents
input.answer_schema: - [ANSWER_1] key=highest_trading_financial_assets_company | meaning=The company with the highest trading financial assets value | expected_value=scalar
input.merge_policy: Document-local evidence should be merged by comparing the extracted trading financial assets values from each document. The company with the highest value will be identified as the answer. Out-of-set mentions should be ignored, partial coverage should be resolved by ensuring all documents are checked, and conflicts should be resolved by verifying the extracted values. No-hit results should prompt a re-evaluation of the search strategy.
input.search_target_ask: Identify the trading financial assets value for each company
input.search_target_success_condition: Extract specific trading financial assets values for comparison
input.scoped_region_map:
- [R2] region_type=table_region | section_path=一、主要财务数据 | packet_span=P2..P5 | preview=一、主要财务数据 （一）主要会计数据和财务指标 公司是否需追溯调整或重述以前年度会计数据 回是 □否 追溯调整或重述原因 □会计政策变更 □会计差错更正 区同一控制下企业合并 □其他原因
- [R4] region_type=table_region | section_path=一、主要财务数据 | packet_span=P18..P21 | preview=区适用 □不适用 单位：元 |项目|本报告期金额|说明| |---|---|---|
- [R13] region_type=table_region | section_path=一、主要财务数据 > 三、其他重要事项 > 四、季度财务报表 | packet_span=P102..P165 | preview=|---|---|---| |流动资产：|-|-| |货币资金|2,698,701,359.81|3,002,943,201.62|

input.instruction: 请你阅读以上多个公司的财务报表，仅根据上述看到的内容回答以下问题。对于问题中涉及到的财报中没有的内容，你可以忽略这部分，只回答其他部分。
input.question: 请回答 '交易性金融资产' 最高的公司是哪一个？
input.task_goal: Identify which company has the highest value of '交易性金融资产' (trading financial assets) based on the provided financial reports.
input.task_model: - [MODEL_1] answer_topology=scalar | atomic_decision=comparison | search_regime=closed_set | grounding_unit=table_row | coverage_mode=exhaustive | stop_condition=when the highest trading financial assets value is identified across all documents
input.answer_schema: - [ANSWER_1] key=highest_trading_financial_assets_company | meaning=The company with the highest trading financial assets value | expected_value=scalar
input.merge_policy: Document-local evidence should be merged by comparing the extracted trading financial assets values from each document. The company with the highest value will be identified as the answer. Out-of-set mentions should be ignored, partial coverage should be resolved by ensuring all documents are checked, and conflicts should be resolved by verifying the extracted values. No-hit results should prompt a re-evaluation of the search strategy.

- [P1] type=paragraph | section_path=ROOT | text=证券代码：300463                            证券简称：迈克生物                        公告编号：2024-032
迈克生物股份有限公司2024年第一季度报告
本公司及董事会全体成员保证信息披露的内容真实、准确、完整，没有虚假记载、误导性陈述或重大遗漏。
重要内容提示：
1.董事会、监事会及董事、监事、高级管理人员保证季度报告的真实、准确、完整，不存在虚假记载、误导性陈述或重大遗漏，并承担个别和连带的法律责任。
2.公司负责人、主管会计工作负责人及会计机构负责人(会计主管人员)声明：保证季度报告中财务信息的真实、准确、完整。

input.instruction: 请你阅读以上多个公司的财务报表，仅根据上述看到的内容回答以下问题。对于问题中涉及到的财报中没有的内容，你可以忽略这部分，只回答其他部分。
input.question: 请回答 '交易性金融资产' 最高的公司是哪一个？
input.task_goal: Identify which company has the highest value of '交易性金融资产' (trading financial assets) based on the provided financial reports.
input.task_model: - [MODEL_1] answer_topology=scalar | atomic_decision=comparison | search_regime=closed_set | grounding_unit=table_row | coverage_mode=exhaustive | stop_condition=when the highest trading financial assets value is identified across all documents
input.answer_schema: - [ANSWER_1] key=highest_trading_financial_assets_company | meaning=The company with the highest trading financial assets value | expected_value=scalar
input.merge_policy: Document-local evidence should be merged by comparing the extracted trading financial assets values from each document. The company with the highest value will be identified as the answer. Out-of-set mentions should be ignored, partial coverage should be resolved by ensuring all documents are checked, and conflicts should be resolved by verifying the extracted values. No-hit results should prompt a re-evaluation of the search strategy.
input.search_target_ask: Identify the trading financial assets value for each company
input.search_target_success_condition: Extract specific trading financial assets values for comparison
